title: Colon Polyps (Post-Polypectomy Surveillance)
subtitle: Understanding your polyps and when you need your next colonoscopy
description: Clear, evidence-based information about colon polyps — what they are, what your pathology report means, your surveillance schedule, and how to reduce your risk. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

guidelines.title: Canadian Association of Gastroenterology Colorectal Cancer Screening Guideline
AGA Clinical Practice Guideline on Post-Polypectomy and Post-Cancer Resection Surveillance
